name: awesome-osint-arsenal
description: 🔍 Curated OSINT & recon toolkit for Kali Linux — 100+ tools, one-command installer, covering SOCMINT, GEOINT, network recon, dark web, forensics & more.
readme_summary: Awesome OSINT Arsenal is a comprehensive shell script toolkit designed for Kali Linux and other Debian-based systems, offering over 750 tools categorized for various cybersecurity tasks. It simplifies the installation and access to tools for reconnaissance, red teaming, blue teaming, digital forensics, hardware analysis, and practice labs, with a special subset for Termux on Android.
key_features: Multi-distro compatibility (Debian, Ubuntu, Arch, Fedora, etc.)
Includes tools for SOCMINT, GEOINT, network recon, dark web, forensics, and more
primary_use_case: To provide a centralized, easy-to-install, and organized collection of cybersecurity and OSINT tools for security professionals, researchers, and ethical hackers.
cover_image_prompt: A highly organized, futuristic library where shelves are filled not with books, but with glowing, interconnected digital tools and data streams. A central holographic interface displays a map of the digital world, with various icons representing different OSINT and security disciplines (e.g., magnifying glass for recon, shield for defense, circuit board for forensics). A skilled investigator figure, wearing subtle tech-enhanced glasses, is interacting with the interface, pulling relevant data streams towards them. The overall mood is one of powerful, accessible information gathering and analysis. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing accents.

name: kadr
description: AI-native GPU-accelerated video editor with Claude Code built into the timeline
readme_summary: Kadr is an AI-native, GPU-accelerated video editor built with Electron, React, and TypeScript. It integrates AI agents directly into the timeline, allowing for real-time editing assistance and automated features like subtitle generation and motion graphics creation.
key_features: GPU compositing (WebGL2) for real-time preview and rendering
Keyframing for various properties (position, scale, rotation, opacity, masks)
True 3D capabilities for clips and tracks
Animated masks with multiple shapes and feathering
Local speech recognition (faster-whisper) with word-level timestamps
Automatic animated subtitles with word highlighting
Remotion fragments for programmable motion graphics (React/TSX)
Integrated Claude Code for AI-assisted editing and fragment creation
Fast and efficient export with hardware encoding (WebCodecs)
Background proxies, auto-saving, and cross-project presets
primary_use_case: AI-assisted video editing with real-time GPU acceleration and integrated AI coding for motion graphics.
cover_image_prompt: A futuristic video editing timeline visualized as a vibrant, flowing river. On the riverbanks, AI 'assistants' (represented by glowing, abstract figures) are actively shaping and directing the flow of video clips. One assistant is weaving animated subtitles directly into the stream, while another is composing intricate motion graphics that emerge like digital flowers from the water. The main editor, depicted as a skilled conductor, uses a holographic interface to guide the AI and manipulate the river's flow. Subtle code snippets and data visualizations are embedded in the riverbanks, representing the underlying technology. The overall mood is creative and collaborative, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of blues, purples, and glowing accents. The scene is rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style.

name: homer
description: A very simple static homepage for your server.
readme_summary: Homer is a lightweight, self-hosted static homepage designed to provide a simple and fast dashboard for managing your server's services. It is configured via a YAML file and offers features like smart cards, fuzzy search, and theme customization.
primary_use_case: A self-hosted, customizable dashboard for organizing and quickly accessing frequently used web services and applications.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized librarian character meticulously organizing a vast, colorful library of glowing service icons on a large, interactive digital bookshelf. Each icon represents a different web service. The librarian is using a magical magnifying glass to instantly locate and highlight specific services, while small, subtle code snippets float around the scene like dust motes. The overall mood is organized, efficient, and welcoming, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, ambient lighting and a vibrant color palette, clearly showing the 'Homer' name integrated into the library's signage.

name: penpot
description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
readme_summary: Penpot is an open-source design and prototyping platform that enables teams to collaborate on digital product development. It emphasizes full ownership of design infrastructure through self-hosting and works with open standards like SVG, CSS, and HTML, integrating design and code with features like Design Tokens and a powerful API.
key_features: Works with open standards (SVG, CSS, HTML, JSON)
Design Tokens for a single source of truth
Powerful open API and plugin system
primary_use_case: Collaborative design and development of digital products, bridging the gap between designers and developers with open standards and self-hosting capabilities.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, bustling workshop where designers and developers are collaboratively building a digital product. One side shows designers sketching ideas on digital canvases, with elements like UI mockups and wireframes flowing like streams of light. On the other side, developers are assembling these elements into a functional product, with code snippets and components assembling like building blocks. In the center, a large, glowing 'Penpot' logo acts as a bridge, with design elements seamlessly transforming into code structures. Subtle UI elements showing real-time collaboration and design tokens are visible. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with bright, clean colors, emphasizing seamless integration and teamwork.
